summary: W930 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while removing W929's vacuous x in Set.univ witness membership from the target-codomain compactness primitive. targetCodomainCompactNoPrincipalPrimitiveOfNoUnivMembershipPrimitiveW930 reconstructs W929's provider by adding Set.mem_univ for the selected point before delegating through the W929 route.
